387 K4C K4C_NOT_EATING (K4C) Leaves 25 percent or more Food Uneaten at Most Meals CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional problems - leaves 25% or more food uneaten at most meals. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
388 K4D K4D_NONE_ABOVE (K4D) None of Above Nutritional Problems CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional problems - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
